ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "net_change" REAL /* Net change in price from the previous day */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend per share */,
  "yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "ytd_change" REAL /* Year-to-date percentage change */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the portfolio (e.g., long-term growth, income generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, risk assessment) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data and content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "stock_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-news relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., news, alert, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (read or unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
